title: elymus elongatus var. ponticus
intro: Elymus elongatus var. ponticus, also known as Pontic wheatgrass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Elymus elongatus var. ponticus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
